name: Chinese New Year
notes: Worst time for budget travel. Great for atmosphere.

name: Golden Week (China)
notes: Mainland tourists flood in. Book everything early.

name: Mid-Autumn Festival
notes: Lanterns, mooncakes. Tourist bonus not problem.

name: Tet (Lunar New Year)
notes: Locals travel home. Tourist services shut down. Not just crowds — no services.

name: Da Nang Fireworks Festival
notes: International event. Hotels book out. Check dates yearly.
